pythonFunction.name: create_booking
pythonFunction.description: Create the booking after the guest confirms the summary and payment method (Phase 3). Pass property_id, room_id, check_in, check_out (YYYY-MM-DD), guest_name, and payment_method (reference the method on file only). Returns the confirmation_number and a payload that renders a confirmation card and navigates to the confirmation page. Announce the returned confirmation number exactly.
